name: Temporal Inbound Exclusion
description: Basic scenario with one client having a temporary inbound exclusion. Client 0 excludes client 1 from rounds 1-3, after which all clients use the global track.

expected_tracks.global: Global track (for clients 1, 2, 3, 4 without specific disagreements)

expected_tracks_round_4.global: Global track (for all clients after disagreement expires)

round_1_rules.description: Clients 1, 2, 3, 4 should be on the global track

round_4_rules.description: All clients should be on the global track after disagreement expires
